creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The build fails with plist errors:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/contributing.md
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/design.md
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/textrendering.gv
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/textrendering.png
Error: Orphaned: %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/textrendering.svg
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.


Please check and revisit.  You can check if the plist is correct by running "make check-plist".
